arts.ttl: Bayern Munich signs US youngster Bajung Darboe from LAFC
arts.sum: Darboe has signed a “long-term contract” and will join Bayern’s reserve team, the German club said Wednesday. At club level, he has played for the reserve teams of LAFC and the Philadelphia Union.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany says Josip Stanišić is “very close”, but João Palhinha and Hiroki Itō are still relatively far away from a return
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany has become accustomed to dealing with a multitude of injury situations, but things are looking up (well, at least partially) for a few players. Hopefully, the injury situation rapidly improves for all three players.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayern Munich vs. Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. Hoffenheim.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich a fan of Manchester United’s Kobbie Mainoo?; Next stop for James Rodriguez? Liga MX; Erik ten Hag to Borussia Dortmund?; Benfica’s Jan-Niklas Beste to Brentford?; Michael Olise earns more recognition; and MORE!
arts.sum: Believe it or not, there are rumors linking Bayern Munich to Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo floating around during this latest edition of the winter silly season. Pletti says Mai-noooooo on rumors linking Bayern to United midfielder (@Plettigoal)

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer hopeful Bayern Munich ends Hinrunde on a winning note vs. Hoffenheim
arts.sum: The Bundesliga is officially back underway and Bayern Munich marked off its first match of 2025 with a tricky, 1-0 away win at Borussia Mönchengladbach. And we want to end the first half of the season on a positive note,” Neuer said ahead of the Hoffenheim visit (via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich is “listening to offers”, unhappy that club shopped him last summer
arts.sum: In addition, the Germany international reportedly wants assurances that the club will make a concerted effort to improve the team before he makes a final decision on signing a contract extension: The most interesting part of the report was that Bayern Munich was — allegedly — ready to sell Kimmich for a paltry fee of €35 million last summer.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies credits defensive teammates as Bayern Munich decision looms
arts.sum: The Canadian men’s national team star is flourishing at left-back under first-year Bayern coach Vincent Kompany, and he has perhaps never looked as comfortable or in sync with his back line — even though he spends much of his time venturing forward. “I think both of them [center-backs Kim Min-jae and Dayot Upamecano] are incredible players,” Davies declared in a Bundesliga.com interview last week (as captured via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen close on Bayern Munich while French giants suffer cup woe
arts.sum: In Italy, Juventus were held to their 13th draw in 20 Serie A games this season.

arts.ttl: Kane scores to extend Bayern's lead at top
arts.sum: Watch highlights as Harry Kane scores a penalty as Bayern Munich beat Borussia Monchengladbach to extend their lead at the top of the Bundesliga to four points.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen continue pursuit of Bayern Munich with narrow Mainz win
arts.sum: Alejandro Grimaldo's stunning free-kick was the difference as Bayer Leverkusen kept the pressure on Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich with victory over Mainz. Patrik Schick of Leverkusen attempts to round Mainz goalkeeper Robin Zentner in a one-on-one situation - IMAGO/BEAUTIFUL SPORTS/Axel Kohring
